parents.subject: LU-19068 quota: truncated time should be kept during race

commit.subject: LU-18601 test: fix sanity/205l to cover all mdts
commit.message:
LU-18601 test: fix sanity/205l to cover all mdts

Occasionally not all the job stats are collected on mds1 host.
When multiple MDT hosts are configured ensure the jobstats are
configured and collected from all the hosts.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Change-Id: I8f35e6853e4af0df5840716d15e7ec2e8302dba5
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/61338
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
